name: Girraj Agrawal
professionalSummary: Enthusiastic and self driven B.E. Computer Science and Engineering graduate seeking a fresh role as an Associate Software Engineer or Software Engineer. Equipped with a solid understanding of software development principles, programming, and problem solving, along with hands on academic project experience. Adept at learning new technologies quickly, collaborating with teams, and contributing to the development of scalable and efficient software solutions. Looking for an opportunity to begin a professional career while adding value to organizational objectives and growing as a technology professional.

technicalSkills.skills: Applies dedicated knowledge to create responsive, user focused interfaces utilizing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Proficient in core development using Java and Python, and adept at data management using MySQL.
Motivated and equipped with a strong foundation in building comprehensive, end to end software solutions
Leverages strong troubleshooting, debugging, and critical thinking abilities to write clean, Object Oriented Programming (OOP) code.
Highly collaborative mindset with a focus on contributing effectively to dynamic engineering teams.

projects.title: Web Component Development Using Core Java Technologies
bullets: Engineered backend web components and managed data structures using Core Java, ensuring clean object oriented design and efficient execution.
Designed and consumed RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless data exchange between Java server modules and client side applications.
projects.techStack: Core Java, JavaScript, RESTful API, Android and iOS mobile App.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering
education.school: Oriental Group of Institutes, Bhopal, M.P.
Govt. Excellence School No. 1, Shivpuri, M.P.
